reason: Tests check exact solution strings (comment text 'Renumber part_index_in_query to be contiguous starting from added_parts' and loop pattern 'for (size_t local_idx = 0; local_idx < analysis_result->parts_with_ranges.size(); ++local_idx)'). Cannot pass 'behavior_in_task_description' (requires these exact strings) without failing 'no_solution_leakage' (strings ARE the solution). Tests need rewriting to verify behavior, not exact text.
